corrections.issue: Temporary-license restriction was framed too loosely as 'controlled business.'
corrections.action: Rewrote stem, correct option text, and explanations to track Texas Insurance Code §4001.157 more closely.

corrections.issue: Stem referred to an 'individual family' policy, while the Texas newborn-coverage authority reviewed was tied to employer-plan statutes.
corrections.action: Reframed the item to a Texas small employer health benefit plan while keeping the 31-day answer.

corrections.issue: Domain label was inconsistent with a common-to-all-lines unfair-discrimination item.

flags.issue: Near-duplicate concept with validated batch 04's Medigap waiting-period reduction item.
flags.note: Retained because the batch still needs Medigap coverage and this item remains legally supportable, but future batches should avoid repeating the same month-for-month reduction angle.

cross_batch_notes.relationship: same core Medigap waiting-period reduction concept
